content:
1. I am a returning player! I first started playing around 2023. I was bored and was scrolling through the app store for games to play. I thought it'd be fun to download a lot of games that seemed fun even if they were bad, because I was bored. When I first saw Morimens in my recommended games, I initially thought it was made by the same creators of Reverse:1999 because the aesthetic and quality were so similar lol. I loved it, but had to take a break for school. I came back to play the game sometime around October of last year, and it felt like coming home. I've recently gotten into horror, so going through the main story again, I've only loved it more.  At the end of every chapter, I thought "there's no way they top this" but it just keeps getting better! I've uninstalled many other games I downloaded back in 2023, but I've kept Morimens and will keep supporting this game for as long as it goes on!
2. The scene with Jenkin at the end of the Wax Museum. I cried lol. That was when I knew that Morimens had a completely different direction and story to offer than a lot of other gacha games. side note: I like how 24 isn't shown as evil, but rather as a kind and caring person who simply struggles. As someone who also struggles with mental health, she isn't perfect as a character, but I like the way she is depicted as someone we should root for. 
3. More stories!! I know it's a given that we'll get more event stories, but I eat them up every time. 
4. Kind of new to the discord server, not sure if this happens often, but I like how we got to see behind the scenes development of Xu. I hope we get to see this with other characters!! 
5. keep up the good work! and also pickman rerun when? my friend joined after pickman's banner ended and got really obsessed with him after I showed a sketch i made of him <:Thais_snicker:1468258174908891355>

your friend is in luck
Pickman rerun banner is next week
will curriculum get any update anytime soon? while rose script is valuable for those lacking it, i think gnosis elixir should also be added as a reward
